name: MAC Search
description: Trace a device MAC through Cisco switch trunks, map the path, and save its last-seen location.
author: System

inputs.name: target_device_id
inputs.label: Device from Inventory (optional)
inputs.description: Select a device whose stored MAC should be traced.

inputs.name: manual_mac
inputs.label: MAC Address (optional)
inputs.description: Overrides the selected device MAC when provided.

inputs.name: start_switch_id
inputs.label: Starting Switch
inputs.description: Cisco switch where the trace should begin.

inputs.name: start_switch_ip
inputs.label: Starting Switch IP (optional)
inputs.description: Use when the starting switch is not in the inventory.

inputs.name: telnet_port
inputs.label: Telnet Port
inputs.description: Used automatically only when SSH cannot connect or authenticate.

outputs.name: location
outputs.description: Final switch and access port where the MAC was learned.
